description: DB unit tests verify tenantDb root scoping, alias parsing, metadata failures, global/admin behavior, branded scoped queries, tenant joins, and unscoped reason validation.
Existing tenantScopedQuery tests continue to pass after facade additions.
Representative NinjaOne contract tests verify the app slice uses tenantDb and has no direct tenant-root predicates in migrated sections.
Algadev sanity confirms the ticket list loads and a ticket detail page opens after the code-bearing batch.
